notes: Direct copy of the full booking OpenAPI used as the authoritative command-generation source for Sonik Agent UI. The sibling copied booking SDK command registry is retained as upstream proof but may lag this OpenAPI; scripts/check-booking-command-copy-retrofit.mjs gates the known drift explicitly.

schema.description: Optional filter — restrict the list to contexts of one kind.
Start of the availability window (ISO 8601 date or datetime), inclusive.
End of the availability window (ISO 8601 date or datetime), inclusive.
Optional party size for policy-aware availability filtering. Defaults to 1 when omitted.
Optional booking source for policy-aware availability filtering. Defaults to web when omitted.
Optional resource type target for policy-aware availability filtering. When supplied with resourceUnitId, the unit must belong to this type.
Optional resource unit target for policy-aware availability filtering. Implies the unit's resource type for policy matching.
Filter to a single persistent auth/user holder.
Deprecated optional filter to customer-context id for old/imported rows.
Only bookings starting at or after this instant (date-range lower bound).
Only bookings starting at or before this instant (date-range upper bound).
The booking_resource assignment row id to release.
Free-text search over user name/email (max 120 chars). Omitted = recent users.
Legacy active/inactive resource unit filter; maps to status=active when true.
A booking-domain UUID (Postgres uuid primary/foreign key).

Organizer template slug, for example country-club or restaurant.
Organizer template slug, for example country-club or restaurant.
Optional demo organization slug used to produce deterministic dry-run ids.
Organizer template slug, for example country-club or restaurant.
Optional demo organization slug used to produce deterministic dry-run ids.
Required for application/octet-stream uploads; multipart uploads carry contextId in the form body.
Optional file name for application/octet-stream uploads.
Optional media role for application/octet-stream uploads, such as context_overview or floor_plan.
Opaque durable booking media asset identifier. New booking.media_asset rows use UUIDs; legacy mounted media catalogs may return non-UUID ids and must remain readable.
Contract/SDK metadata read. The authenticated REST href can still stream bytes when metadata is omitted outside generated clients.
Opaque durable booking media asset identifier. New booking.media_asset rows use UUIDs; legacy mounted media catalogs may return non-UUID ids and must remain readable.
